title: saxifraga wardii var. wardii
intro: Saxifraga wardii var. wardii, also known as Ward's saxifrage, is a species of flowering plant in the saxifrage family, native to the Himalayas. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Saxifraga wardii var. wardii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken to harness its medicinal properties.
